# GitHub Copilot Instructions

* Decoupled Pipeline: Maintain the strict boundary between System 0 (Plastic Emotion Engine) and other reasoning cores. Do not blend their functional scopes.
* Architecture Compliance: Ensure suggestions adhere strictly to the design principles in README.md and TODO.md
* Bilingual Flexibility: Do not hardcode string translations that disrupt the dynamic Korean/English selection routine. Also, your reviews and comments must be in both languages.
